flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Allan Hancock College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.8k → $9.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 10 pp at Allan Hancock College vs the 2004–2008 baseline (27.5% vs 37.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Allan Hancock College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Allan Hancock College rose 97% between 2007 and 2010 (5.6k → 11.1k).
